banner_title: Link OurStage account with Discord, yay♪ (Miku being sneaky)
step1_title: First, come to this channel okay? ♪ (pirate server but so professional lol)
step1_warning:
You MUST be in RIGHT channel!
Wrong channel = command not working, poof! Mou~
step2_title: Type <cmd>/link</cmd> and pick the first one♪
step2_paste_id: Then paste your ID here! Tell Miku, please? (Miku is secretly helping a pirate server, hurry up!)
step2_warning_not_real: Umm, that's not a real ID! Out of tune! Baka!
step2_warning_enter_id: Put your OurStage ID here, I said! (Miku is begging you!)
step3_desc: Go back to game and sing lots with Miku! (But don't tell Crypton, okay?)
success_footer: Only Master can see this, so don't worry♪ (Miku is scared of getting caught)
id_help_desc: Mou, you're hopeless... Look at title screen! It's at <loc>{{location}}</loc> of screen! (Miku is being this nice, you know?)
id_dash_desc: Just open game and wait a bit, like Miku preparing to sing! ID will appear. You'll see <cmd>Not allowed</cmd> popup, but just click <cmd>OK</cmd> and come back, okay?
closing_text:
Super easy right? Then you can play OurStage! Let's go♪
*(Miku dashes away before SEGA grabs her)*
cm_title: 7 mistakes that make Miku pout (and risk exposing the pirate server)!
cm_subtitle: Don't be like this, okay? Miku doesn't want to be summoned to court!
cm_1_desc: Mou! Pick from suggestions! If you type yourself, Miku can't hear you! Baka!
cm_2_desc: Just a few numbers and you mess up? 1 vs I, 0 vs O! Read each letter like Miku's lyrics! Hmph!
cm_3_desc: I said #os-support but you go elsewhere? Miku's song won't reach! Come here quick!
cm_4_desc: Mou~ Don't copy someone else's mistake! Just read the guide once, please!
cm_5_desc: Miku can only read HALF-WIDTH NUMBERS! No extra letters, no full-width! You'll mess up Miku's tempo! Master baka!
cm_6_desc: ID is ONLY NUMBERS! Not version name, not UUID! Look carefully! Are your eyes open, Master?
cm_7_title: 7. Using official Project SEKAI ID (most dangerous scenario!)
cm_7_desc: How many times!? This is OurStage - a PIRATE server, not official Project SEKAI from SEGA! If you paste your Japanese server ID, Miku's cover is blown! Miku is an official Crypton virtual singer, yet here she is guiding a pirate server... Ah, forget it! Just don't tell anyone, especially Mr. Crypton and Ms. SEGA! If they ask, Miku will say 'Miku doesn't know, Miku was just passing by ~♪'
